2604.15109.title: IUQ: Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification for Long-Form Large Language Model Generation
2604.15109.paper_summary: Despite the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), uncertainty quantification in LLM generation is a persistent challenge. Although recent approaches have achieved strong performance by restricting LLMs to produce short or constrained answer sets, many real-world applications require long-form and free-form text generation. A key difficulty in this setting is that LLMs often produce responses that are semantically coherent yet factually inaccurate, while the underlying semantics are multifaceted and the linguistic structure is complex. To tackle this challenge, this paper introduces Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ), a novel framework that leverages inter-sample consistency and intra-sample faithfulness to quantify the uncertainty in long-form LLM outputs. By utilizing an interrogate-then-respond paradigm, our method provides reliable measures of claim-level uncertainty and the model's faithfulness. Experimental results across diverse model families and model sizes demonstrate the superior performance of IUQ over two widely used long-form generation datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/louisfanhz/IUQ.
2604.15109.paper_summary_zh: 儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）迅速發展，但LLM生成中的不確定性量化仍然是一個持續的挑戰。雖然最近的方法通過限制LLMs生成短小或受限的答案集來達到強勁的表現，但許多現實世界的應用需要長篇和自由形式的文本生成。在這種情境下，一個主要的困難是LLMs經常產生語義上連貫但事實上不準確的回應，而潛在的語義是多面向的，語言結構也很複雜。為了解決這一挑戰，本文介紹了詢問不確定性量化（IUQ），這是一個新穎的框架，利用樣本間一致性和樣本內忠實性來量化長篇LLM輸出的不確定性。通過利用詢問-然後-回應的範式，我們的方法提供了可靠的主張層級不確定性和模型忠實性的量度。來自不同模型家族和模型大小的實驗結果顯示，IUQ在兩個廣泛使用的長篇生成數據集上表現優越。代碼可在 https://github.com/louisfanhz/IUQ 獲得。
2604.15109.author: Haozhi Fan et.al.
2604.15109.authors: Haozhi Fan, Jinhao Duan, Kaidi Xu
